title: Youtube Essentials
description: This projects adds fun tools for creators to play around with such as: Subscribe blocks and more!
body:
This is the: "Youtube Essentials" mod by Skowmovies.
it features a lot of cool additions for youtubers or creators.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- The Green Screen Block
  Obtained by smelting lime concrete.
  
- The Subscribe Block
  Obtained by crafting Redstone and a Green Screen Block together.
  
- Viewer Boost
  an enchantment that plays a applause everytime you kill a mob to gain more views!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
If you have any suggestions or cool idea's, Join my discord! [Click here!](https://discord.gg/XzpcA98mMW)
